I found an event that looks like the one you mean:

- Title: "Dentist Appointment" (id: 5)
- When: 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (1 hour)

Before I reschedule it to 2024-05-20 at 10:00 and keep the same 1-hour duration, I need two quick confirmations:

1) Is this "Dentist Appointment" the event you meant by "Dental check-up"?  
2) What email address should I notify for the clinic? (The event currently only includes your email, so I need the clinic's address to make sure they get the notification.)

Optional: Would you like a custom message in the notification email, or should I use a short default message saying the appointment has been moved to the new date/time?

Tell me yes/no for (1), provide the clinic email for (2), and indicate if you want a custom message (paste it if so). Once you confirm, I’ll reschedule and send the notifications.
